zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Wrottesley III於1400年9月23日出生在英國斯塔福爾萊斯斯利時，他的父親John de Wrottesley21歲，母親Elizabeth Standish21歲。他和Thomasine de Gresley至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1464年在他的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Wrottesley III于1400年9月23日出生在英国斯塔福爾萊斯斯利时，他的父亲John de Wrottesley21岁，母亲Elizabeth Standish21岁。他和Thomasine de Gresley至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1464年在他的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wrottesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wrottesley in Tettenhall (Staffs).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Wrottesley III was born on 23 September 1400, in Wrottesley, Staffordshire, England, his father, John de Wrottesley, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Standish, was 21. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Thomasine de Gresley. He died in 1464, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Wrottesley III est né le 23 septembre 1400, à Wrottesley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Wrottesley, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Standish, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Thomasine de Gresley. Il est décédé en 1464, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Wrottesley III am 23. September 1400 in Wrottesley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Wrottesley 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Standish 21. Er hatte mit Thomasine de Gresley mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1464 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Wrottesley III è nato il il 23 settembre 1400 nel Wrottesley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, John de Wrottesley, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Standish, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Thomasine de Gresley. Morì nel 1464, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Wrottesley IIIが1400年9月23日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウロッテスリーで生まれた時，父John de Wrottesleyは21歳，母Elizabeth Standishは21歳であった。彼はThomasine de Gresleyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1464年に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Wrottesley III(이)가 1400년 9월 23일 영국 스태퍼드실르 로츠리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Wrottesley(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Standish(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Thomasine de Gresley(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Wrottesley III nasceu em 23 de setembro de 1400, em Wrottesley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Wrottesley, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Standish, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Thomasine de Gresley. Ele faleceu em 1464, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Wrottesley III родился 23 сентября 1400 г. в местности роттесли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Wrottesley было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Standish, 21. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Thomasine de Gresley. Он умер в 1464 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Wrottesley III nació el 23 de septiembre de 1400, en Wrottesley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Wrottesley, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Standish, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Thomasine de Gresley. Murió en 1464, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
